description_long: This ornate sculpture features a draped female figure carved in white stone, standing beneath an elaborate, gold-colored canopy. The figure is depicted in classical attire, with flowing garments and a partially veiled head, holding up the decorative canopy with one arm. The canopy itself is richly adorned with gold and silver detailing, including a beaded trim and intricate folds that mimic fabric. The sculpture is set against a rough, stone-textured background, suggesting it is part of a larger architectural element, possibly a wall niche or alcove. The craftsmanship highlights a strong contrast between the smooth, pale figure and the textured, metallic-looking drapery above. A small plaque or sign is visible on the stone background, indicating some form of identification or dedication.
description: A classical female figure in white stone stands beneath a richly detailed gold and silver canopy, set against a rough stone background. The sculpture features intricate drapery and a small plaque on the side.
description_view_0: The front-left view shows the full figure and the ornate canopy, with the gold drapery and beaded trim clearly visible, as well as the stone background and plaque.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the sculpture, showing the thickness of the stone background and the side profile of the figure and canopy.
description_view_2: The front-right view provides a clear look at the figure's face and the detailed folds of the gold canopy, with the stone background receding to the left.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the verticality of the sculpture, showing the side of the figure and the layered canopy, with minimal background visible.
attribute_subject_matter: classical female figure beneath an ornate canopy
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is set against a rough stone wall, suggesting an indoor or sheltered architectural setting, possibly within a historic building or church.
